wordplay_note: Assassin sent after the new Quizmaster
card_description: Ted Benteley is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Solar Lottery*. Assassin dispatched by the previous regime to kill the lottery winner. Name note: Assassin sent after the new Quizmaster. The hit man as political instrument. First appears in *Solar Lottery*.

reference.brief: Assassin dispatched by the previous regime to kill the lottery winner
reference.significance: The hit man as political instrument
